Task item 4 (emit the measurement-report artifact with the full profile→checks→runner table) is deferred to proposed_next_work_boundaries; task item 2 (per-profile core vs dogfood/live/heavy/historical classification) yields candidate buckets only, with authoritative taxonomy explicitly deferred to the implementation Building (missing_scope #1, constraints #5). Whether any profile_id is genuinely dead/stale — no full cross-repo selector scan (CI/operator/docs) was performed by the report or by this review.
Per-profile/per-check RUNTIME cost, including the '5+ minutes' onboard_seam_case claim, which is carried from the task source and not reproduced (no timing run; --all avoided).
